title: Our Ten Days In India | #shorts
full_text: I mean women have very few rights >> where he said you cannot work if you want to be a part of my life. >> This episode is about India which is what we're talking I have a question why are they honking? Everyone is sitting in the same traffic. >> I don't know if life is just about happiness. I don't know what I want. >> It is really cool how they managed to fit cars in spaces I never thought cars could fit before. >> Yeah, but you're a boy. It's not the same as Di. How did you feel? Do you feel that way, Mom? >> I have no idea what he's talking about. >> I was going to say it's safe to say that loneliness is not an issue in India. >> How did you observe that in 10 days? >> What? >> I don't know about that.
